prompt: Remove a non-default input source. System Settings > Keyboard > Input Sources > Edit > select a non-primary source > '-'. Setup adds a temporary input source (British English) so the eval can detect a real removal. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings remove_input_source'` (drops the last AppleEnabledInputSources entry). The eval reads com.apple.HIToolbox AppleEnabledInputSources and expects the count to have decreased.
